title: Council Election #3
brief: This proposal determines who will serve on the Star Atlas DAO Council for its third term (January 11, 2026 - October 11, 2026). As outlined in PIP-10, there will be only one round of voting. Six candidates nominated themselves during the nomination period. The top five candidates, selected through ranked-choice voting using the Single Transferable Vote (STV) method, will become officially elected Star Atlas Council members on January 11th, 2026.
description:
# PIP-25 (Council Election #3)

This proposal determines who will serve on the Star Atlas DAO Council for its third term (January 11, 2026 - October 11, 2026). As outlined in [PIP-10](https://govern.staratlas.com/proposals/ed887a4e-344e-44d6-8a47-c815d9e8ec8e), there will be only one round of voting.
Six candidates nominated themselves during the nomination period. The top five candidates, selected through ranked-choice voting using the Single Transferable Vote (STV) method, will become officially elected Star Atlas Council members on January 11th, 2026.
For more information regarding the Star Atlas Council and the election process, please review [PIP-10](https://govern.staratlas.com/proposals/ed887a4e-344e-44d6-8a47-c815d9e8ec8e). You can also read up on the Council and how the DAO operates on the [DAO Knowledge Base](https://star-atlas-dao.gitbook.io/knowledge-base/overview/our-structure/council).

# DAO Council Nominees

![emperoraa](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/3/Emperor.png)

## 1. Emperor ===[] (emperoraa)

**X Profile: N/A**

I am running to continue contributing to the development of a governance system unlike any other in gaming or Web3. With 24 years of real-world nonprofit, organizational, and civic governance experience—including serving over a dozen times as Board President across multiple organizations—I bring a deeply practical, process-driven approach to decentralized leadership.
Over the past seven months on SAC2, I have focused on strengthening structure, transparency, and participation in the DAO. I believe in empowering the community, creating clear and consistent processes, and building systems that scale as we grow. My goal is to help shape Star Atlas governance into a model that blends efficiency, community autonomy, and innovation.
I’m excited to continue ideating and refining governance procedures, increasing community engagement, and onboarding more people into meaningful participation. This is an opportunity to build something truly new—A DAO structure that is functional, transparent, and resilient. I want to continue that work.

---

![atlas_freeks](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/3/Atlas_Freeks.png)

## 2. [ECL] YassFreeks (atlas_freeks)

**X Profile:** [Freeks Code \(@FreeksCode\) / X](https://x.com/FreeksCode)

Member of the French guild ECL Eclypse, active in the Star Atlas ecosystem for over three years. Passionate about SAGE Labs, resource management, and the economic balance of the metaverse.
I strongly support community-driven initiatives like the Arty Hosting Service, which helps small players access affordable automation hosting to grow their fleets.
My goal is to represent builders and everyday players who make Star Atlas thrive — by supporting practical, scalable solutions that strengthen both the economy and inclusiveness of the DAO.

---

![winston](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/3/Winston.png)

## 3. ROME | Winston (winston7026)

**X Profile:**  [𝐑𝐎𝐌𝐄 || Winston \(@Winston_SA\) on X](https://x.com/Winston_SA)

I’m running for Council to take action in governance and assist in shipping PIPs that will help us grow our DAU and ecosystem. 
My top focus is communication and outreach: Making governance accessible in every language we speak here in the Star Atlas global community. 
I am in the planning stage to launch a Translator & DAO Helper Network in each Discord language community with a clear playbook, so POLIS holders get DAO news and local-language access to the PIP process, plus a two-way funnel that translates drafts back into English for the DAO stage. 
Participation is low; even a few active members per language can change the curve. The DAO must not be kept to the few already following chats. We will proactively reach those who might feel excluded or are simply unaware. 
Success for my term: participation rates higher than when I started. 
Experience: Since 2021, senior leadership in ROME Guild (comms, internal admin, co-managing a ~$20,000 treasury). 15 years leading sandbox-MMO guilds (up to 30–40 active players). This would be my first formal DAO governance role. I’m ready to bring fresh energy and reliability.

---

![jithblade](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/3/Jith_Blade.png)

## 4. [EMP] jith blade (jithblade)

**X Profile:** [@jithblade](https://x.com/jithbladecrypto)

I am looking forward to being considered to be part of the council and I hope to get the chance to share my knowledge and experience with the star atlas community, I will be continuing to be part of governance regardless of if I win or not.

---

![lanzer](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/3/Lanzer.png)

## 5. LANZER (lanzer)

**X Profile:** [@mrLanzer](https://x.com/mrLanzer)

I am currently on the SAC-2 council and I am heavily invested in Star atlas. I aim to improve the DAO by making it easier to participate in the DAO and keeping the DAO informed of Council activities.

On SAC-2 council, we achieved more 100+ accomplishments improving the ecosystem, published 30+ meeting reports, paid out 40M+ ATLAS to PIP authors, enabled participation of 1.6K+ voters with 1B total PVP. We have streamed almost every public DAO meeting to maximize transparency. I want to continue that trend.

I’m dedicated to Star Atlas’s success. I offer proven leadership, web3 expertise, game experience, and contract/proposal skills. I ask for your vote on the Star Atlas Council’s 3rd term.

---

![morango_dk](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/3/Morango.jpg)

## 6. Q | Morangø (morango_dk)

**X Profile:** [@Morango_dk](https://x.com/Morango_dk)

After years of watching this project grow, today I feel the need to participate more actively, exploiting my social skills and my feeling that Star Atlas is fam.
